title: TSOLs
description: adds custom Armors, tools, loot drops, weapons...
body: The mod adds 8 types of crystals (air, aqua, ender, gelu, ignis, lux, tenebris and terra) that drop from vanilla mobs. These crystals are the foundation of the mod and are used to create new mod items (armor, weapons, tools, etc.). The goal of the mod is to diversify the number of items and make killing mobs more enjoyable and beneficial for players.
